channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: News Corp Australia Blocks Crawler Bots with Access Restrictions
item.description: The article discusses a technical issue faced by users attempting to access News Corp Australia websites, where automated crawler bots are being blocked by the publisher's software. The message explai...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce Tie the Knot in Intimate Madison Square Garden Wedding
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce married in a private garden setup within Madison Square Garden, with over 1,000 guests attending the event. The wedding, held on Friday, featured personalized touches suc...

item.title: Retailer Pepkor challenges Capitec's banking dominance in South Africa
item.description: The article discusses the growing competition between Pepkor, a major South African retailer, and Capitec, a leading low-income bank, for control of the mass-market wallet. Capitec has long dominated ...

item.title: Amazon Prime Day Product Reviews: Floss, Baking Sheets, and More
item.description: The text highlights various Amazon Prime Day deals and customer reviews of products. A floss with a bright color is praised for its visibility and effectiveness in cleaning plaque while being gentle o...

item.title: Political Scandal and Corruption Allegations Emerge in Government Oversight
item.description: The article discusses a political scandal involving a high-ranking minister accused of corruption and misuse of public funds. Investigations into alleged embezzlement have sparked public outrage, with...

item.title: Russian Attack on Kyiv Leaves at Least 12 Dead
item.description: A massive Russian missile and drone attack on Kyiv resulted in at least 12 deaths and over 50 injuries, according to Ukrainian officials. The assault, which occurred early Monday, targeted residential...

item.title: Lahore Police Extend Custody of Three Suspects in Foreign Women's Sexual Assault Case

item.title: Footballer in critical condition after severe head injury during match
item.description: Nathan Fitzgerald, a 27-year-old high school teacher and footballer for Epping Football Netball Club, is receiving end-of-life care after sustaining a severe head injury during a match in Lalor, Melbo...

item.title: Assam Assembly Recognizes Hindi as Official Language Alongside Assamese, English, and Bodo
item.description: The Assam Legislative Assembly has introduced Hindi as an official language alongside Assamese, English, and Bodo, as announced by Speaker Ranjeet Kumar Dass. This decision marks the first time Hindi ...

item.title: Nasarawa State Launches 1,000 Rural Teaching Jobs Initiative to Address Manpower Shortages
item.description: The Nasarawa State Government has approved the recruitment of 1,000 primary school teachers under a specialized rural scheme to address manpower shortages in remote areas. Over 10,000 applicants compe...

item.title: Congressional Tax Committees Face Power Shift Amid Lawmaker Departures
item.description: The 2026 midterm elections are months away, but the battle for influential congressional tax-writing panels is already intensifying. Politico reports that a 'wave of departures' is creating opportunit...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding highlights celebrity nuptials and public celebration
item.description: The article details the extravagant wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, held at Madison Square Garden on July 4th, which drew global attention. The event featured a lavish celebration with over ...

item.title: Federal Public Servants Return to Offices Four Days a Week, Leading to Space Scarcity
item.description: The article discusses the growing challenge of office space scarcity faced by federal public servants in Canada as they transition back to in-office work four days a week. This shift, part of broader ...

item.title: Australia and New Zealand Condemn China's Ballistic Missile Test in the Pacific
item.description: China has conducted a successful ballistic missile test in the Pacific Ocean, sparking international concern. Australia and New Zealand have criticized the test, with Australia's Foreign Minister Penn...

item.title: 55-Year-Old Woman Reflects on Regrets of Triplets After Divorce
item.description: Sharon, a 55-year-old woman from Kenya, has shared her experience of raising triplets alone after her husband, Stuart, left them. The woman, who is also a mother of other grown-up children, regrets ha...

item.title: Rafał Milach's Exhibition Explores Propaganda and Protest in Eastern Europe
item.description: Rafał Milach's exhibition 'Refusal. Second Fracture' examines the intersection of propaganda and protest through a combination of images, murals, objects, and videos. The work bridges the relationship...

item.title: Former Amaanat CEO Charged with Fraud and Money Laundering After Years of Investigations
item.description: Hussun Abdool Khalek Omar, former chief executive of Amaanat Investment Holdings, appeared in court facing 35 charges of fraud and money laundering. The case, which began over four years ago, alleges ...

item.title: Tanzanian Police Warn of Security Threats Amid Protests
item.description: Tanzanian police have issued a warning that protesters planning the July 7 Saba Saba demonstration intend to assassinate government leaders and security officials to steal weapons, aiming to disrupt p...

item.title: EJ Obiena's Year-Best Vault in Greece Marks Progress in Recovery
item.description: Filipino pole vaulter Ernest John Obiena (EJ Obiena) achieved a significant milestone by clearing 5.81 meters during the Fly Athens meet in Greece on July 5, 2026, marking his first time surpassing 5....

item.title: PFIPC Scandal: Disowned DG's Alleged Misuse of Government Resources
